Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Nov-27-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Andrew J. Dickson, Esq., CONSUMER LAW EXPERTS, PC (310) 442-1410 andrew@nolemon.com, service@nolemon.com Attorney for Plaintiff, THAI ANH NGO
Ali Ameripour, Esq., THETA LAW FIRM, LLP (424) 297-3103 eservice@thetafirm.com, Attorney for defendant American Honda Motor Co., Inc.
Jane Hong, CSR 1975, 909-831-2644, csrjane@hotmail.com, Court Reporter

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows

DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR COMPANY, INC. Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration is taken under submission.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Jane Hong, CSR 1975, 909-831-2644, csrjane@hotmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
